spans.name: researcher
spans.input: Identify PCI DSS requirements for the topic and cite sources.
spans.output: Requirement 1.2.7 and Requirement 8.3.6 apply; both are grounded in the knowledge base with cited passages.

tool_calls.input: PCI DSS requirements for the topic

spans.name: writer
spans.input: Turn the researcher's grounded findings into a full report.
spans.output:
# Compliance Report

Requirement 1.2.7 ... Requirement 8.3.6 ...

## Sources
- s3://corpus/pci-dss.txt

spans.name: designer
spans.input: Map each report requirement to an AWS implementation.
spans.output: Requirement 1.2.7 -> security groups; Requirement 8.3.6 -> IAM MFA. No tool used.
